prompt: Here's a README I wrote for a command-line tool. I think it's too wordy and hard to follow. Can you refactor it to be clearer and more concise?

assertions.name: reduced_word_count
assertions.description: Final README is significantly shorter than the original (ideally 40-50% of original length)

assertions.name: scannable_structure
assertions.description: Uses clear headers, bullet points, and short paragraphs that readers can scan quickly

assertions.name: removes_redundancy
assertions.description: Eliminates repetitive explanation and hedging language (e.g., 'might want to consider', 'it is important to note')

assertions.name: preserves_info
assertions.description: Retains all essential information: installation, commands, command descriptions
